prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of a female samurai warrior kneeling in seiza in a snowy Japanese garden. She wears ornate cracked white ceramic samurai armor repaired with gold kintsugi seams, with layered shoulder guards, gauntlets, skirt plates, and tied waist cord; the armor is weathered with subtle dirt, scratches, and small dark red blood stains on the thigh. Her face is intentionally hidden by a plain centered gray rectangular censor block with no facial features visible. She has black hair styled in a high messy bun with loose strands and decorative hairpins. She holds a long white katana or sheathed sword horizontally across her lap with both armored hands, matching the cracked white-and-gold kintsugi motif and a dark ornate guard. The background is a soft-focus winter Japanese courtyard with snow-covered stone lanterns, shrubs, rocks, a pond or wet stone surface, and misty pale trees. Red maple leaves drift through the air around her, including several large foreground leaves, contrasting with the cold blue-gray snow. Use realistic high-detail digital art, dramatic shallow depth of field, soft diffused overcast lighting, cool desaturated palette with gold accents, centered symmetrical composition, full torso and knees visible, no readable text, no watermark, no extra characters.
